payload.summary: UDM Pro auto-recovered crash; correlated with AAAA POST to static-dns

payload.finding: resolver does not consult AAAA in static-dns; POST is a lightly-tested path

payload.action: never write AAAA via static-dns; recorded in /udmcontrol skill + memory

payload.root_cause: UniFi controller bug on AAAA-on-static-dns POST

lessons: closed-source firmware APIs need behaviour-on-change checks
every UDM write should go via /udmcontrol skill

payload.summary: PC + tablet show 'Unable to connect' and reload loop on hass.bluejungle.net

payload.finding: WS /api/websocket returns 101 then UC reset; XFF shows public WAN IP (cloudflare detour)
AAAA for hass.bluejungle.net from proxied CNAME -> Cloudflare; IPv6 wins Happy Eyeballs

payload.action: added LAN-only keuken.bluejungle.net; tablet uses it; auth via Cloudflare path also works for sander

payload.root_cause: IPv6-via-Cloudflare detour + local_only on kiosk user + cloudflared restart loop

payload.outcome: resolved with LAN-only hostname + cloudflared fix

payload.summary: UDM/UniFi console keeps crashing — disable all UniFi pollers

payload.hypothesis: poller traffic is contributing to controller instability

payload.root_cause: unknown — under investigation; polling load suspected
payload.status: all UDM-bound pollers stopped; UDM should stabilise. Monitor + investigate root cause before re-enabling.
